name: Sylvera

when_to_use: Carbon credit quality rating API for ESG platform
Geospatial data API for climate risk analytics

review.verdict: The serious data source for carbon-credit due diligence, but priced and scoped for institutional buyers only.
review.best_for: Institutional investors rating voluntary carbon credits
review.not_for: Retail climate apps or hobbyist offset calculators

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
